programme.desc: Claire and Gloria want to spend a nice Mother's Day outdoors hiking with the kids, but their non-stop bickering drives Claire to the edge. Phil and Jay stay home to cook everyone a nice dinner, but things turn awkward.

programme.title: Modern Family: Good Cop Bad Dog
programme.desc: Phil and Claire swap parenting roles for the day. Claire will be the fun-loving good cop and Phil the disciplinarian bad cop. Gloria takes in every sob story and stray she comes across, and Jay gives business advice to an overzealous entrepreneur.

programme.title: Modern Family: See You Next Fall
programme.desc: The whole family is gathering at Jay's before heading out to Alex's graduation ceremony from middle school. Jay is preoccupied, hiding a Botox mishap from everyone, and Cameron is upset about Mitchell's habit of laughing at his expense.

programme.title: Modern Family: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Jay wants nothing more than to have a quiet birthday out fishing on the lake, but the family thinks he really wants a big celebration. Claire and Mitchell wind up trapped in the yard of their childhood home. Phil runs into his old college nemesis.

programme.title: Modern Family: Dude Ranch
programme.desc: The family vacations at a dude ranch in Wyoming where Jay squares off against a surprising foe. Mitch and Cam want to share news about their pending adoption plans, but suddenly realize that Lily may not be as ready as they are.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Folly
programme.desc: The detectives investigate when a young man is beaten during a rendezvous with an older woman at a hotel.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Parasites
programme.desc: A young woman is found buried in an apartment courtyard with a collar and leash.

programme.title: Dateline: Toxic Relations
programme.desc: Linda Curry had it all: looks, a great job and a brilliant husband. When she got sick, doctors were stumped. Then, she died and police were as puzzled as the doctors, but not her close friends and family. They just needed someone to listen.

programme.title: Dateline: Death in the Driveway
programme.desc: In a quiet Southern town, police find a prominent lawyer brutally murdered and his girlfriend bound in duct tape. Investigators pursue a long list of leads, until they zero in on a surprising suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Bodies in Motion
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine lead the team as they tackle three separate investigations: a murdered couple found in bed in a suspicious trailer explosion, a stripper discovered dead and dumped in the worst part of town and two bodies found in the truck of a car.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Answers

programme.title: NCIS: Good Cop, Bad Cop
programme.desc: When a marine's body surfaces halfway around the world, the investigation forces Ziva to dig up a buried chapter of her life.

programme.title: NCIS: Code of Conduct

programme.title: NCIS: Outlaws and In-Laws

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Platform
programme.desc: When it appears one of their own shot an unarmed man on a busy Boston subway platform, the team must fight to find the real killer while clearing their detective's name. It becomes clear that the circumstances surrounding the shooting are not clear.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bassholes
programme.desc: Jane and Maura find themselves submerged in the cutthroat, high-stakes world of competitive bass fishing when a tournament-leading fisherman is killed. At the same time, Frankie is paying the price after losing a bet.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Imitation Game
programme.desc: The murder of a notorious thief sends Jane and Maura into the world of art heists and forgery, and forces Jane to tango with an FBI agent who has a keen interest in her case. There's also a new man in Angela's life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Face Value
programme.desc: The good news is we have a witness to a murder. The bad news is he suffers from Prosopagnosia, commonly known as facial recognition blindness, and he can't recognize the killer. The Rizzolis prepare for a visit from their scheming cousin, Carlo.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: A Bad Seed Grows
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl is murdered and left in a cage, Jane and Maura must overcome the ethical dilemma of a psychiatrist and the stiff opposition of a fussy prosecutor to find the killer. Meanwhile, Jane has couch issues and Frankie sees UFOs.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Live Life Forward: The Miracle of Give Kids The World
programme.desc: Give Kids the World and its community of corporate sponsors unite, creating an unforgettable experience for critically ill wish children and their families.

programme.title: The Closer: Speed Bump
programme.desc: The team must figure out if a hit-and-run on a recently released criminal is a murder.

programme.title: The Closer: Cherry Bomb
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is found dead and questions lead to the son of an L.A. County Sheriff. As Johnson investigates, she learns that the son may be hiding behind his father's badge and may have done so before.

programme.title: The Closer: Live Wire
programme.desc: When a reporter alerts Brenda to a crime scene, Priority Homicide and the FBI fight for jurisdiction over the case. Meanwhile, interpersonal relationships on the squad force Brenda into a corner.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Nice to Meet You, Dr. Isles
programme.desc: When the jeweler to Boston's super cool and famous dies, our investigation leads us to a member of the Isles family we've never met. And that leads us to a secret Maura has been keeping for almost all of her life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Love Taps
programme.desc: The murder of a college student takes an odd turn when Jane and Maura discover he had 32 girlfriends. Uncovering who killed him and why leads them into a world of app developers, virtual boyfriends, and relationships built on lies.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sister Sister
programme.desc: When a dog trainer is found dead at home, her champion Rottweiler is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Fuentes/ Lawson
programme.desc: A pampered female detective who firmly believes anything a man can do a woman can do just as well swaps lives with an obedient, stay-at-home wife and mom who believes her role in life is to fulfill her husband's every command and take care of her family.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Slater/ Williams
programme.desc: A dance-obsessed housewife who maps out every minute of her day and pushes her kids in ballroom dancing competitions swaps with a mother of three who lets her kids eat whatever and whenever and runs her house like the wild, wild West.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Rowland and Rivera
programme.desc: Meet Robin Roland, a freewheeling motorcycle-riding mother of three carefree teenaged girls from Illinois. The Roland girls swap places with the children of a New Jersey mom named Grace Rivera, who rules over her two daughters with an iron fist.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Crazy, Sexy and Deadly
programme.desc: Shayna Hubers and Ryan Poston seemed like a match made in heaven, until he ends up dead in a pool of blood, shot in the face. Stunning interrogation tapes leave cops in disbelief and lead investigators to a surprising motive.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Killer Affair
programme.desc: Days after a pregnant elementary school teacher disappears, her boyfriend goes in front of TV cameras and tearfully pleads for her return. But investigators soon discover the grieving boyfriend may have had more than one reason to cry.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sisters in Death
programme.desc: After his high-school aged daughters disobey him by dating, a strict father allegedly kills them.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sex Slaves in Texas
programme.desc: Alfonso Diaz-Juarez is accused of kidnapping young women from Mexico and forcing them into prostitution in Houston cantinas.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Brutal Obsession
programme.desc: A rejected abusive boyfriend stalks his ex and mother of his child, trapping and killing her at her workplace. A 61 year-old grandmother is raped by a 37 year-old after being lured into his dungeon-like home.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: An young father allegedly murders his parents in a haze of rage and drug-addiction then abandons his child and flees to the American South.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Enemy Next Door
programme.desc: Kevin Patrick Stoeser is caught looking at lewd pictures in a halfway house following his release. Knowing this will put him back behind bars, he flees and has been on the run ever since.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trapped
programme.desc: An isolated road becomes a death trap when a medical emergency strikes a secluded homestead. The Raneys face their first ever failed rescue.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Drowning
programme.desc: The Raneys must save two Hawaiian homesteaders who built their dream homestead in the path of life-threatening flash floods. As the weather closes in, the Raneys must battle to save a homestead from drowning and also win the trust of the homesteaders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Deconstructed: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: The Raney family kicks off the most ambitious rescue ever, on their own 40 acres. As multiple generations gather to help, Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get thousands of pounds of gear to the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: One If by River, Two If by Air
programme.desc: An aerial supply mission faces turbulent skies as Marty breaks ground on massive foundation posts for his cabin. Misty and Maciah begin an innovative greenhouse that requires lumber, but Matt and Katie must first troubleshoot the new sawmill.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Passive River House
programme.desc: A pro builder constructs an off-grid dream home for his family on a remote riverside plot of land in the heart of Canada's east coast. He faces tropical storms, winter blizzards and more all while using innovative methods to meet passive house standards.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Threat of Fire
programme.desc: The Browns push through the pandemic, even planning Baby Eli's birthday celebration, when a massive wildfire strikes. When everything they've built is threatened, they must quickly rescue as many animals as possible.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: One If by River, Two If by Air
programme.desc: An aerial supply mission faces turbulent skies as Marty breaks ground on massive foundation posts for his cabin. Misty and Maciah begin an innovative greenhouse that requires lumber, but Matt and Katie must first troubleshoot the new sawmill.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Passive River House
programme.desc: A pro builder constructs an off-grid dream home for his family on a remote riverside plot of land in the heart of Canada's east coast. He faces tropical storms, winter blizzards and more all while using innovative methods to meet passive house standards.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Threat of Fire
programme.desc: The Browns push through the pandemic, even planning Baby Eli's birthday celebration, when a massive wildfire strikes. When everything they've built is threatened, they must quickly rescue as many animals as possible.

programme.title: I Quit: Uncertain Futures
programme.desc: Mentor Tricia Clarke-Stone visits Ashanti, Tyshemia and Jasmine once more to find out if their Esrever wine business has a future. Meanwhile, Versattire's Matteo and Julie fly to Paris Fashion Week, and Blue Coolers' Marcus and Chris hit the road.

programme.title: I Quit: Winner Takes All
programme.desc: While all of the businesses faced challenges, three of them have impressed the mentors with their perseverance and passion. The entrepreneurs are invited to New York for one more mentoring session, unaware that one of them will walk away with $100,000.

programme.title: Expedition X: Cambodia's Jungle Monster
programme.desc: The surge of human activity surrounding the discovery of an ancient city sends Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot deep in the Cambodian jungle to search for a monster that has been terrifying locals for centuries.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mothman Phenomenon
programme.desc: Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres dive into the legend of Mothman by searching for clues in a long-sealed bunker and a top-secret Air Force base.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror on Doll Island
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot power through camera malfunctions and emotional breakdowns in order to find an explanation of what is happening on the Island of the Dolls, a dangerous place that locals have long avoided.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Mexican City
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches Mexico for clues behind the mysterious rise and disappearance of Teotihuacan, a powerful civilization that predated the Aztecs in Mesoamerica.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Incan King's Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into the mysterious cloud forests of Ecuador's remote central highlands in search of the all-powerful mummy of the last Inca king, Atahualpa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Spanish Fortune, Found!
programme.desc: Josh travels the coast of Florida and to the newly opened country of Cuba in search of sunken treasure from a fleet of Spanish ships sunk in 1715. The hunt takes him deep into the Atlantic and into the previously sealed National Archives of Cuba.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Plummer's Gold
programme.desc: Josh sets off for gold rush country to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh explores hidden cave systems and blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Tomb of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: Josh travels to Hungary to join three separate archeological teams looking for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun. Legends and ancient texts lead the search from the bottom of the Danube to the mountain forests just outside of Budapest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Vanished Empire
programme.desc: On the Mediterranean island of Crete, the Minoans built one of the most glorious civilizations in the ancient world and then mysteriously vanished. Josh Gates travels to Greece to find out exactly how Europe's first superpower disappeared.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cloning the Woolly Mammoth
programme.desc: To help clone the extinct woolly mammoth back to life, Josh Gates visits the Korean biotech lab driving the project and excavates ancient bones in a working Canadian gold mine. He then descends into a vast sinkhole in Siberia to unearth frozen DNA.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Journey to the Ice Age
programme.desc: To find a viable sample of mammoth DNA, Josh Gates retrieves bone samples from the massive Batagay Crater. He then journeys far upriver to a site in the lawless Siberian wilderness where tusk hunters carve out troves of bones from the permafrost.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Readings and Renovations
programme.desc: Theresa unexpectedly reads one of the construction workers in her home. In a group reading, she changes the mind of a skeptic who lost his son in a car accident. Later, with Larry living in LA, Theresa tries to spend time with her family.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: An Accident on Tour
programme.desc: Theresa is sidelined after a severe accident. But she doesn't remain silent, conducting readings at her doctor's office and directly after surgery. Housebound, Theresa must open her home for group readings for the first time in years.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Tumbles and Tornadoes
programme.desc: The Waldrops must evacuate the mobile home when a tornado touches down nearby. A school is destroyed during the tornado, so the boys hold a fundraiser to help the teachers. The babies compete in the First Annual Waldrop Sixtathlon with help from the boys.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Back to the Farm: Boxing Up the Past
programme.desc: Matt is eager to get the farmhouse in order, which leaves Amy stressed out and struggling to pack up 30 years of memories. Zach is up for the challenge of watching Jackson and Lilah alone for the first time, but two kids are a lot harder than one.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Lilah's Big Scare
programme.desc: Valentine's Day is coming, but problems get in the way of romance. When Lilah's cold turns into something serious, Tori's worst fears are realized. As Chris puts pressure on Amy to move out of the farmhouse, Amy and Matt battle over missed deadlines.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Six Little Dates
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric take the babies on special individual dates, revealing surprising facets of each baby's personality. Wales and Bridge have their first karate test, but Bridge makes a shocking decision. A bombshell leaves the family's future uncertain.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Nightmare on Quint Street
programme.desc: It's Halloween, but before the Busby’s can celebrate the Quints' first trick-or-treat outing, they must race to find costumes, shop for pumpkins and get the new house ready for a Halloween party, all while making a final decision on a $100,000 investment.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Back to the Farm: Boxing Up the Past
programme.desc: Matt is eager to get the farmhouse in order, which leaves Amy stressed out and struggling to pack up 30 years of memories. Zach is up for the challenge of watching Jackson and Lilah alone for the first time, but two kids are a lot harder than one.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Lilah's Big Scare
programme.desc: Valentine's Day is coming, but problems get in the way of romance. When Lilah's cold turns into something serious, Tori's worst fears are realized. As Chris puts pressure on Amy to move out of the farmhouse, Amy and Matt battle over missed deadlines.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Six Little Dates
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric take the babies on special individual dates, revealing surprising facets of each baby's personality. Wales and Bridge have their first karate test, but Bridge makes a shocking decision. A bombshell leaves the family's future uncertain.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Nightmare on Quint Street
programme.desc: It's Halloween, but before the Busby’s can celebrate the Quints' first trick-or-treat outing, they must race to find costumes, shop for pumpkins and get the new house ready for a Halloween party, all while making a final decision on a $100,000 investment.

programme.title: The Little Couple: The Toilet Exploded
programme.desc: The Klein family settles into life at their new house but has a lot of decisions to make about renovations. They shop for lighting and plumbing fixtures and test some paint colors with the kids. Then, it's time for some barbecue and pool fun.

programme.title: The Little Couple: I'm Gonna Catch the Biggest Fish
programme.desc: It's family vacation time, so the Klein's, Jen's parents and aunt Barbara head up the Florida coast to visit Jen's sweet great uncle Ray. Their getaway leads to learning about sea turtle rescue, fishing and celebrating uncle Ray's 87th birthday.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Love Is Love
programme.desc: Transgender bride Gabrielle hopes to find a dress that rivals her fierce drag queen gowns. Will Kathleen, a budget-conscious accountant, find a dress for her Tax Day wedding? Bride Mykia's father is a Kleinfeld super-fan with a big surprise in store.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not with Those Chubby Arms
programme.desc: Angelica is looking for the perfect strapless gown but her mom thinks her arms are 'too chubby' to be seen! Tiffany and her crew of gospel singers are preparing for her holy matrimony.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: It's Been Pretty Tough
programme.desc: As new parents, Jeremy and Audrey face many unexpected, emotional challenges. Zach and Tori attempt to sleep train Jackson and Matt gets looks for a fun solution. Amy's birthday approaches and surprises await.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: There's No Plan B
programme.desc: As Matt struggles to get everything set for pumpkin season, Jeremy and Zach juggle their duties as fathers with their farm responsibilities. Meanwhile, Amy must negotiate selling her baked goods at the farm and the new pirate ship may be a money pit.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: It is an emotional battlefield as mothers and daughters struggle to prepare for the long journey ahead that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: For the Love of Family
programme.desc: Tensions run high at Lorna and Chae's baby shower. Kim's boyfriend violates probation. Newly single Nicole struggles. Lemhele races to the hospital to give birth.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Flying Trapeze

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Tourniquet/ Burning Desire
programme.desc: DNA evidence found on a murder victim leads to the arrest of Houston's notorious 'tourniquet killer;' after a young woman is found shot and burned in California, investigators spend years trying to pin the rap on the woman's boyfriend and his cousin.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Man in the Shadows/ The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A DNA hit sends an ex-convict back to prison; a hitchhiker is murdered in California.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Reconstructing Murder/ Fire Flicks
programme.desc: Advances in forensic clay modeling help to identify a victim; two boys like setting fires.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Sunday Morning Slasher
programme.desc: Police in Ann Arbor, Detroit and Houston attempt to catch Coral Eugene Watts, whom they suspect is a serial killer. Their attempts are fruitless, but he is caught when two of his victims don't die, who identify him. He then confesses to 13 murders.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Killer on Campus/ The Bow Hunter
programme.desc: In 1969, a first-year law student is found shot twice in the head with nylon stockings wrapped around her neck, but police are unable to find the killer until they get a hand from DNA evidence 31 years later. A man confesses to killing a hunter.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Killer Slips Away
programme.desc: The loving aunt of a close-knit family was stabbed to death in her home and it took two decades for detectives to discover that a clue lay hidden in plain sight for 24 years.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: A young girl is kidnapped and killed on her way home from a costume party. Ten years later, a detective's obsessive attention to detail exposing a shocking mistake that kept a suspect on the street for 10 years.

programme.title: The First 48: Fast Friends/ The Thin Line
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a young father is murdered in his car, and detectives discover his friend may know who pulled the trigger. In Tulsa, the homicide team goes on the hunt for a shotgun-wielding killer who tore a family apart.

programme.title: The First 48: Spree Killer
programme.desc: Tulsa's most vulnerable members find themselves potential victims of a possible spree killer. Detective Max Ryden does all he can to try and stop the murderer from upping their body count.

programme.title: The First 48: The Deadliest Sin/ Bloodlines
programme.desc: In Mobile, the murder of a 19-year old becomes personal when the team learns he is Det. Jermaine Rogers' cousin. In Tulsa, a 31-year old mother is gunned down in front of her home by an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail
programme.desc: The Joker that absolutely hates massages; and the length of time it took the make-up team to get Joe all doled up for his debut as a female techie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers to help them bury bizarre items, and then they try to cling onto strangers’ cars. The big loser makes enemies at an auction house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: To Nightmare Manor
programme.desc: The crew answers a call at a haunted house. While they search for the source of the fire, each of them is forced to confront their greatest fears.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: A Christmas Story

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pantsing With the Stars
programme.desc: The guys pair up to share educational ideas with perplexed parents, then teach Krav Maga to martial arts newbies. When one joker refuses, he becomes the big loser, and faces an opponent that scares the pants off him.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.desc: Michael shows shoppers how to manipulate solid objects and reveals how vacuums work. Plus, one man's day becomes very colorful and confusing.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Campfire Cookout
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting together some delicious campfire favourites and reliving her childhood by camping out in her backyard. Her husband Nick is building the fire, and they've invited some old camp buddies to join the fun.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Generational Goodies
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's mom comes to the farm to share a few family recipes before baby arrives. Molly makes pastrami eggrolls as a tribute to her mother's hometown to go with citrus chicken rice bowls and grilled veggies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Farm Traditions
programme.desc: Molly is putting a fresh spin on the classic farm lunch. There's her easy garlic and onion challah bread, chopped salad with crumbled feta and her all-time favourite creamy homemade hummus.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Harvest Pre-Haul
programme.desc: It's beet harvest pre-haul time, and Molly Yeh is making the coziest foods imaginable to keep her husband, Nick, primed for the work ahead. She whips up her tender spiced beef hotdish with bacon jalapeno cornbread, loaded potato skins.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Father and Daughter
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is busy working on a mom-made lunch for her father-daughter duo on the farm.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cheap And Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has been stocking up for four make-ahead meals that are as cheap as they are easy to make. There's inexpensive slow cooker teriyaki ribs with quick slaw, Tex-Mex meatballs, BBQ chicken baked potatoes and a cheesy rigatoni pepper bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Osage Cowboy's Lunch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making a classic cowboy lunch for her husband, Ladd, and the other cowboys. She starts with a cheeseburger meatloaf that's everything they love about two favorite foods in one dish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: No Cooking Required
programme.desc: Ree Drummond features some fuss-free recipes that require no cooking. Dishes include her Ranch Muffuletta Sandwich with Spicy Olive Spread and a Chinese Chicken Salad that features rotisserie chicken and ginger.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Double Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has a half-empty nest while her daughters are off at college, but she still needs good, hearty food at her fingertips for her hungry teenage sons. So she's cooking up dishes that she can serve half now and freeze the rest for another time.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh Boy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking for her permanently hungry teenage sons. First, she makes buffalo chicken totchos that are a blend of potato tots, nachos and wings.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Around the World in Three Carts
programme.desc: In round one, the chefs must create an international dish using items found only in the clearance carts. Next, the chefs set out to make a delicious dessert until Guy surprises them with a red light special.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Spice Masters
programme.desc: In Flagstaff, Arizona, the Fieris head to a farmers' market where they find fresh organic chicken and roasted green chiles. Then, they fly through the Grand Canyon and cook up a homemade chicken taco dinner on a houseboat before landing in New Mexico.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG vs. Iron Chefs

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Super Stocked: An Offal Halloween
programme.desc: In a spook-tacular Halloween cook-off our chefs start out with some pumpkin bowling to determine the frightening ingredients in their daring dish. Next, competitors rummage through some creepy clearance carts to find ingredients to make a dish.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals the new deep-sea discoveries that might offer definitive proof of the infamous giant squid, and using this fresh evidence, experts investigate if this underwater monster is the legendary kraken.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes inside a cutting-edge archaeological investigation that is unearthing brand-new discoveries about Noah's Ark. As experts get closer to finding its final resting place, they reveal the long-lost secrets of this famous vessel.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Escobar's Treasure Sub
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals details of a high-speed chase between a narco sub and the US Coast Guard. With the help of declassified files and cutting-edge military technology, experts investigate if they've found Pablo Escobar's lost treasure.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Dinosaur Cowboys
programme.desc: On the series premiere of Dino Hunters, dinosaur fossil season has begun and Montana rancher Clayton Phipps finds what might be an extremely rare and valuable fossil on his family's property. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his son uncover a triceratops horn.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Million-Dollar Dino
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps continues his excavation of a rare, carnivorous dinosaur on his Montana ranch. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and son Jake prepare to sell their prized T-Rex fossil. Aaron Bolan hunts for an Ankylosaurus.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Curse of the Carnivore
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps and his team prepare to flip a 20,000-pound carnivore fossil out of the earth and onto a flatbed to get it to the lab for analysis. Meanwhile, Mike Harris hunts for a duckbill skull and Jared Hudson uncovers an ancient reptile.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Operation Croc Rescue
programme.desc: Animal expert Forrest Galante takes a break from his mission of finding extinct animals to rescue a giant crocodile with a motorcycle tire trapped around its neck, traveling to Indonesia in hopes to save its life.

programme.title: Dodo Heroes: Pen and the Dogs of War
programme.desc: British Marine Pen Farthing is the founder of Nowzad, Afghanistan's only official animal sanctuary. When a U.S. soldier rescues 6 puppies while deployed and can't bring them back home, Pen and his team are on a mission to get them reunited in Texas.

programme.title: Dodo Heroes: Roman's Freedom Ride
programme.desc: Seven-year-old social media sensation Roman McConn and his mom, Jen, have saved over 1,500 shelter dogs by connecting them with adopters around the country. They have a month to find homes for over 100 shelter dogs, including Noah, Rocky and Migo.

programme.title: Dodo Heroes: Sam and Mel's Fight for Seals
programme.desc: Seal Rescue Ireland is the only seal rescue organization in The Republic of Ireland. In late fall, massive North Atlantic storms that hit the small island nation coincide with the grey seal pupping season.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Pee Battle
programme.desc: A mother daughter duo’s lovable cats are having a territorial pissing match that's destroying not only their furniture but also their relationship. The cat daddy connects with cat from heaven, Ziggy, who has CPR skills.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Fluffy's Last Stand
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are being torn apart by their cat, Missy, who's determined to kill their other cat Fluffy. Jackson meets a tortie named Candy, who's beating up a nine-year-old because she isn't so sweet.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Guilt Stricken Guardian
programme.desc: Jackson needs to find a way to help a distressed Philly cat named Dale whose uncontrollable peeing is driving a wedge between his guardians. It proves nearly impossible for Jackson to get a guilt stricken guardian to stop feeding her diabetic cat Lasagna.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: My Therapy Cat Needs Therapy
programme.desc: Jackson has a tall order in Delaware helping a veteran with PTSD whose therapy cat, Salem, is stressing him out. The cat daddy deals with Bartholomew, a cat that's shredding the furniture and tearing up a marriage.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Lucifer the Cat
programme.desc: Jackson's in Jersey to help a single mom whose cat, Pickles, is terrifying her kids. The Cat Daddy works with Lucifer, a cat whose devilish food obsession and constant pursuit to eat just might cost him his life.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Posey the Terror
programme.desc: Jackson faces the highest stakes of the series when he experiences the vicious claws of a troubled cat who's terrorizing a family about to bring home a newborn baby; Jackson meets an inspirational cat named Skinny; Jackson meets Cole and Marmalade.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Ferocious Foster
programme.desc: Jackson meets an outdoor cat named Henry, who having been forced to live inside, has protested by soaking the place in pee. A desperate foster guardian resorts to Jackson as her only hope to save a cat from being euthanized.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Partner Patrols
programme.desc: Texas game wardens pair up to help animals in trouble, solve wildlife crimes and assist the public. Whether it's a baby gator that needs relocation or a man suffering from heatstroke, these wardens lend a hand.

programme.title: Movie: The Family That Preys
programme.desc: Two families of different backgrounds have to learn to work together despite the odds against them.

programme.title: Movie: I Can Do Bad All by Myself
programme.desc: A singer with a drinking problem becomes the unwilling parent to three troubled teens who have nowhere else to turn. Though she seems to want nothing to do with them, new circumstances inspire her to change her situation.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Witness Protection
programme.desc: A New York City banker puts his family into a witness protection program at his aunt's home when he is set up as the instigator of his company's fraudulent scheme.

programme.title: Martin: Momma's Baby, Martin's Maybe
programme.desc: When Gina's mother comes to visit, Martin is excited at his opportunity to impress her.

programme.title: Martin: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: The gang decides to hold a contest to see which gender is the better cook at Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Florida Fun and Fury

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Wild, Wild Key West

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Some Fences Are Made to Be Broken

programme.title: Counting Cars: Psychedelic Cycle

programme.desc: Danny takes on a Route 66-inspired Chevy for the famed highway's biggest fan, and later teams up with his good buddy, American Restoration's Rick Dale, on an unusual project for a customer.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Black, White and Hotrod All Over
programme.desc: Danny and the boys meet with a customer who wants a wicked paint job to match his 1959 Anglia dragster. Meanwhile, Shannon and Ryan are building a custom Harley Davidson Bagger for a client using a repurposed police bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Harley and the Mystery Merc
programme.desc: Danny makes a plan to put the Count's Kustoms touch on a classic Harley Davidson that he hopes to sell for a big profit. But when the bike reaches Horny Mike the whole project is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Run It Like You Brung It
programme.desc: Mike gifts all the guys with their own drifter trikes, under one condition; they must customize them, and then race them at the local track. Everyone is up to the challenge, everyone except Kevin.

programme.title: Counting Cars: School of Rick
programme.desc: The Count takes a chance by building a low-rider with a Count's Kustoms twist. Later, a businesswoman commissions the shop to surprise her husband with his very first bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Boogie Down Buggy
programme.desc: Danny takes in a dune buggy to trick out in outrageous Count's Kustoms style, and then gets into some seriously higher horse powered fare at the Shelby Heritage Foundation.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Blinged Out Blazer
programme.desc: Danny's got himself a new ride, a classic two-wheel drive Chevy Blazer that he wants to trick out and flip for a big profit. Painter Ryan wants to try out a new twist on a retro flame design, but Danny is worried that it will look too 'Miami Vice.'

programme.title: Counting Cars: '70s Scoot
programme.desc: Danny takes on a psychedelic chopper project that is so '70s cool, he's worried he might not be able to give it to the customer when it's done. Later, he hits the streets to check out a pair of classic Mini Coopers and a rare Split Bumper Camaro.

programme.title: Counting Cars: '68 Killer Camaro

programme.title: Counting Cars: Dune Buggy Blues
programme.desc: Danny has found and bought a replacement for his beloved Dune Buggy 'Sparkles.' As the guys are turning it into the ultimate '70s beach fantasy, Mike convinces Ryan to take it for a quick joy ride that ends anything but joyful.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Ready, Set, Van Gogh!

programme.title: Counting Cars: Crazy Cool Cadillac
programme.desc: Ryan reluctantly goes down the Caddy customization wormhole on a personal project, and everyone at the shop is happy to watch him go, just to see how great it turns out.

programme.desc: Conclusion, the Intelligence Unit works to find the bombers. Even with the government agencies in the mix, Voight and his team work the case from their own angles and connections. Lindsay and Antonio question doctors who handled a transplant surgery.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: My Way
programme.desc: Commander Perry notifies the Intelligence Unit that Pulpo has been released to help track down a dangerous cartel leader. Meanwhile, Ruzek gets some difficult news as a blast from Lindsay's past comes back.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Docks
programme.desc: As Antonio's life is now in question, Voight and Platt open up about their pasts. Jin is caught while tinkering with Voight's computer and uses the only scapegoat possible to keep him in the clear.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Beautiful Friendship
programme.desc: Atwater is settling into his new gig on intelligence as Antonio is relegated to desk duty while recovering. Lindsay finally realizes she has no way out and confides in Voight for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Call It Macaroni
programme.desc: Jin's murder investigation moves forward and Voight is under close watch by Internal Affairs, but is still in complete command of his unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get My Cigarettes
programme.desc: Intelligence begins to look into a string of murders where the victims have a dollar bill pinned to their chests. Thanks to some digging by Ruzek, Voight learns this friend was involved in some shady business dealings.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Weigh Station
programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chicken, Dynamite, Chainsaw
programme.desc: Two teenage girls have gone missing, and the team knows the clock is ticking to find them. Halstead, Antonio and Lindsay investigate a tenement that gives them a much needed lead. Voight brings the father of one of the girls in to get some honest answers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: An Honest Woman
programme.desc: While trying to help out Olive, Voight is attacked and kidnapped. When he does not show up for work, the team gets suspicious and begins investigating. Ruzek and Atwater prove they do belong on the team when they find a lead.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Prison Ball
programme.desc: The team goes undercover in a prison to gather information on the murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: They'll Have to Go Through Me
programme.desc: The final part of the crossover event finds our intelligence unit joined by detectives from the SVU to help solve the pedophile case. Ruzek and Amaro, along with Halstead and Antonio continue to hunt for the link to foster care and child trafficking.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Midland, TX
programme.desc: Kathy Lujan, a married mother of two young boys, is believed to have run away with one of her lovers. Detective Rosie Rodriguez chases a trail of evidence and suspects that reveal the truth about Kathy’s whereabouts.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Palestine, TX
programme.desc: When a woman discovers the bludgeoned body of her nephew, investigators must unravel the events that led to his demise. With three viable suspects, it takes about a year to crack the case using the smallest piece of DNA evidence from the crime scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Mountain City, TN
programme.desc: A gruesome execution style double murder of a young couple shakes a small mountain community in Eastern Tennessee. With no evidence or DNA left at the crime scene, police rely on the rumor mill and their instincts to try and identify suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Largo, FL
programme.desc: A kind hearted single mother is found brutally murdered, inside her own home. Three potential suspects quickly arise, all claiming innocence, and it’s up to the Largo Police detectives to find out who is the cold blooded killer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Belmont County, OH
programme.desc: A homicide of a beloved young coal miner sends shockwaves through a conservative mining community. As multiple suspects arise, detectives try to determine if the killing was a robbery gone wrong, a crime of passion, or possibly a hate crime.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Marion County, FL
programme.desc: Devoted mother of two, Heather Strong, disappears leaving her two children with her estranged husband, Josh. As Josh becomes an obvious suspect, an unlikely and sinister offender emerges.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Jackson County, WI
programme.desc: A community bands together to search for a missing woman. Police are unable to solve the case until they speak to her husband’s close friend and learn some startling information.

programme.title: Snapped: Jordan Shaver
programme.desc: A suspicious fire and a secret lover lead officials to ask if the wife was involved.

programme.title: Snapped: Lois Kay Cloud
programme.desc: An Arizona farmer’s murder goes cold as speculation mounts about his wife’s secret life and the role of a mysterious con man.

programme.desc: When a man is abducted from his front yard, evidence from a taser and a strange car accident lead them to the unlikeliest of suspects.

programme.desc: The mystery of a decapitated corpse leads police to make an unlikely accusation about a college student and her missing husband.

programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Stranger Signals From Alien Worlds
programme.desc: For decades, researchers have been scouring the universe for signals from extraterrestrials. New discoveries reveal mysterious fast radio bursts from space that may be the key to confirming life in the cosmos.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Big Bang
programme.desc: Explorers tackle the mysteries of life itself leading us to worlds never before seen.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Curse of Dark Matter

programme.desc: New discoveries on alien planets reveal the most violent storms and strangest weather in the universe. On some planets, there might be rain of rubies and diamonds, and others could be earth-like worlds of frozen wastelands and hellish infernos.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Biggest Aircraft
programme.desc: The world's largest aircraft combines the latest in technology and engineering to dwarf everything else in the skies. This marvel can stay airborne for five days and land anywhere in world, whether on land or at sea.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Navy's Super Ship
programme.desc: The US Navy is the largest sea force on the planet and their new, ground-breaking Littoral Combat Ships are the fastest combat ships in its fleet.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Navy's Aircraft Carrier
programme.desc: The US Navy's Ford-class aircraft carrier is the world's largest warship, and using the latest naval and aeronautic technology, engineers and military personnel race to build and test this cutting-edge vessel.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Navy's Super Submarine
programme.desc: The Virginia Class is one of the most advanced nuclear powered, fast attack submarines ever produced for the US Navy. These technological titans are almost 400 feet long, and weigh a staggering 7,800 tons.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Army's Super Tank
programme.desc: The US Army's Abrams tank is a 70-ton war machine capable of reaching speeds of 45 miles per hour on the most extreme terrains on earth, but before it enters the battlefield, it must face a set of brutal challenges to put its engineering to the test.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: F-35 Fighter Jet
programme.desc: The F-35 is the most advanced fighter jet on the planet, and special access into the most expensive military program ever reveals how engineers use cutting-edge technology to outfit this 1,200 mile-per-hour aircraft with a state-of-the-art stealth system.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Chernobyl's Toughest Fix

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Storm Surge Emergency
programme.desc: When sea levels rise, storm surge barriers work overtime to fight off devastating floods. To get this tough job done, a team of experts maintain these engineering marvels to prevent catastrophe and keep millions of people safe.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn't come home from work, her daughter knows something terrible must have happened and reports her missing. As the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: a dead man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness. But when the young victim's checkered past is uncovered, Kenda must wade through a laundry list of potential suspects to find the man's killer.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Married couple Doug and Rozina Anderson's decision to take a long weekend in the peaceful woods of Northern California turns out to be a fateful mistake.

programme.title: Homicide City: Winter's Bones
programme.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: Trouble in Giles County
programme.desc: Business owner Larry Hughes goes missing from his Pulaski, Tennessee, home. His distraught wife Mary Ann enlists police to investigate, but little do they know it will take a quarter-century to put the pieces of this sinister puzzle together.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Times, Deadly Measures
programme.desc: An Appalachian couple is delighted when their neighbors return home after mysteriously disappearing for ten years. But they've changed, for the worse, unleashing a campaign of endless intimidation and harassment that ultimately ends in a bloodbath.

programme.title: Homicide City: Winter's Bones
programme.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: Trouble in Giles County
programme.desc: Business owner Larry Hughes goes missing from his Pulaski, Tennessee, home. His distraught wife Mary Ann enlists police to investigate, but little do they know it will take a quarter-century to put the pieces of this sinister puzzle together.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Times, Deadly Measures
programme.desc: An Appalachian couple is delighted when their neighbors return home after mysteriously disappearing for ten years. But they've changed, for the worse, unleashing a campaign of endless intimidation and harassment that ultimately ends in a bloodbath.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: In a remote town in Oklahoma, Amanda Burney and her fiancée Ethan Walton are out running an errand that quickly becomes a run for their lives.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Small Town Secret
programme.desc: When young Kari Nixon goes missing while on a snack run, no one in her upstate New York town can imagine why anyone would harm her. With no body and few clues, detectives struggle to solve the mystery until a twist leads police to an unlikely killer.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Daylight Abduction
programme.desc: On a sunny summer day in Orlando, FL, a city known for theme parks and family fun, a professional woman vanishes in broad daylight. When her naked body is found dumped in the woods days later, detectives jumpstart a manhunt for her depraved killer.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Flames of Passion
programme.desc: An accomplice's confession exposes a sinister plot orchestrated by a devious killer linked to Troy Temar's past.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: In 2012, 42-year-old Michelle Mockbee's beaten body was found at work. She was wearing her pink sapphire ring, so robbery was ruled out. Employees and her husband Dan were interrogated. The case stalled until video surfaced that blew it wide open.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Beauty for Ashes
programme.desc: In 2016, 33-year-old Tricia Todd was reported missing after failing to pick up her daughter from a babysitter. As her family hoped and prayed, investigators found her online journal that revealed the true horror of what had happened.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Through a Child's Eyes
programme.desc: In 1982, 35-year-old JoAnn Tate was stabbed to death in her home in St Louis. Her kids Melissa, 7, and Renee, 4, nearly died. JoAnn's diary revealed a man Melissa ID'd as the attacker. Years later, new memories emerged that changed everyone's lives.

programme.title: Disappeared: On a Mission
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman moves to the United States for a new opportunity, but in a mere matter of weeks, she vanishes without a trace. Kidnapping survivor, Elizabeth Smart, joins in the search to find her in this mystery where the clues are sparse.

programme.title: Disappeared: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: When 70-year-old retired firefighter Michael Chambers goes missing, a bloody crime scene in his garage quickly indicates foul play. But authorities begin to believe that the crime scene may have been staged and that Michael may have left on his own.

programme.title: Disappeared: A Date with Danger
programme.desc: Nancy Moyer isn't home when her kids come back from visiting their dad. Police look into her background, and find a more complicated life than anyone knows.

programme.title: Disappeared: The Long Way Home
programme.desc: Deanne Hastings, a 35-year-old Spokane mom, leaves a note that she's running to the store, but she never returns. As detectives uncover more information about Deanne's actions leading up to her disappearance, a slew of troubling theories emerge.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: A Winter's Grave
programme.desc: During an icy Wisconsin winter, a single mom vanishes. Police learn she was recently stalked by two men at a bar, but the danger doesn't stop there. A brutal assault, an anonymous email and a bizarre confession shed light on a deadly encounter.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Bitter Blade
programme.desc: When a beautiful home healthcare worker disappears during an icy New York night, loved ones lead the search for her safe return. But a series of incoming text messages and a mysterious missed call reveal a soul-crushing truth and a murder most evil.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Open Season
programme.desc: On a frigid fall evening, a hunter in Missouri is found shot to death. Freak hunting accident or cold and calculating homicide? As the mysterious case unfolds, police uncover a web of infidelity and lies, leading to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Israel
programme.desc: Travel to the Middle East to uncover the very latest weapons being designed for the Israel Defence Forces.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Smart Suburban Holmes
programme.desc: With the interior of the river house complete, it's time to focus on the suburban home as the open house date is fast approaching. Mike, MJ and the crew work feverishly to get the smart home ready and receive the valuation they're hoping to earn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Seasonal Squeeze
programme.desc: The three teams continue their builds in unique, remote Alaskan settings. At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, the team wrestles giant glulam beams into place and the situation turns disastrous after a poorly cut beam pushes out an entire wall.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Emergency Supply Run
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, the team comes dangerously close to catastrophe as they install a 1,000 pound ridge beam. At Mark Sam's build, the team runs out of critical supplies.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Roof Overhead
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, rain has put everything on hold and the crew struggles to keep things dry. At Mark Sam's build on Chichagof Island, tensions run high on Rich's last day making the team uneasy.

programme.title: Building Alaska: End Game
programme.desc: At Point MacKenzie, Dave Poppert fights the cold and snow to finish his home in time for Thanksgiving dinner. Bruce Chambers lucks out when a friend comes to help put the finishing touches his Latouche Island cabin.
