programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Denver
programme.desc: Chef Jordan Andino heads out west to explore the late night food scene in Denver. His first stop is to try some Colorado-inspired appetizers, including elk lettuce wraps and salmon tostadas.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Milwaukee
programme.desc: Jordan Andino is in Milwaukee to sample the city's cheesiest offerings. First up, he heads downtown for a beer cheese-laden Wisco Burger at Oak Barrel Public House. Then he's off to wine bar Balzac for a cheesy spin on a classic dessert.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Smoked
programme.desc: Roger Mooking criss-crosses America to count down 15 of the very best steaks, wings, Reubens and more- all made even better with glorious smoke. From salt-cured country ham to smoked fish chowder, bacon bourbon rib-eye steak to smoky s'mores pancakes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Soul Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking joins chefs in their own kitchens as they honour the traditions of comforting and flavorful soul food dishes. From ribs, catfish and barbecue to oxtail, pork chops and cornbread.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Getting Piggy With It
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes hog-wild at two legendary barbecue restaurants located in America's Barbecue Belt. At A&R Bar-B-Que in Memphis, Roger helps owner Andrew Pillard load racks of St. Louis-style ribs into custom wood-fired pits.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire And Family
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the South to visit two family-run barbecue joints that have been passing down recipes and rigs for generations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat In Full Swing
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets up with a few culinary titans in Tennessee who are swinging for the fences with outrageous rigs. At Wedge Oak Farm in Lebanon, Tenn., he joins Chef Trey Cioccia, owner of Nashville's Black Rabbit, to set up the Burn Tower.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Raising the Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Lone Star State, where they're taking open-fire cooking to new culinary heights with unique rigs. In Fort Worth, Texas, chef and restaurateur Lou Lambert invites Roger to his ranch to slow-roast whole hogs over oak coals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Beef and Beyond
programme.desc: Beef is king in Texas, and Roger Mooking visits two pitmasters who are elevating traditional smoked meats with exciting global flavours. In Pearland, Texas, he helps Ronnie Killen season and smoke brisket and beef ribs to serve at Killen's Barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoking and Spit-Roasting in Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking finds two chefs in Texas who are pushing the boundaries of whole hog barbecue, where pigs are roasted low and slow over coals before the meat is chopped or pulled and seasoned with sauce.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A-Frying In Winter
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chills out with some cool Twin City treats at the Saint Paul Winter Carnival. Despite sub-zero temperatures, he gets into the spirit with local specialties like the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich

programme.desc: Mickey and the Clubhouse pals board Professor Von Drake's new submarine for an underwater adventure.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Masquerade
programme.desc: The clubhouse pals help Minnie get ready for her Masquerade Ball before donning their favourite costumes for Professor Von Drake's big Clubhouse Costume Show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Jr.
programme.desc: Donald needs help teaching his young duckling prodigy Donald Jr. how to do the steps to a special song and dance routine.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Opposites
programme.desc: Whatever Bingo decides to do, Rolly plays the part of charming antagonist and does the opposite.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Hatches an Egg
programme.desc: The clubhouse pals discover a mystery egg among Goofy's rock collection; they try to find out what kind of animal is inside in order to return it to its mother. In the meantime, Donald Duck serves as a reluctant babysitter when the little egg develops.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Happy Mousekeday
programme.desc: It's Mickey's birthday and the Clubhouse gang has organized fun activities for the big Mousekeday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto Lends a Paw
programme.desc: When Minnie's kitty, Figaro, wanders off because he feels ignored, Pluto the Rescue Dog saves the day by finding the missing pet.

programme.title: Chuggington: Sleepyhead Koko / Odd Train Out
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Grasshopper
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Daisy find her new friend, Wilbur the Grasshopper.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Seeing Stars/ A Tiny Triumph
programme.desc: Mazu and her three besties map the stars. Tiny’s artistic skills are put to use when the dinos are lost in the desert.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Where's Mickey? / Cuckoo in Hot Dog Hills!
programme.desc: Mickey helps Mayor McBeagle install a Flammer Jammer into his car. Cuckoo Loca's cousins visit from Paris.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Mini-Golfin' Guard Pups / Summer Splash Bash
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Vampirina: Bust Friends / The Invisible Fan
programme.desc: Vampirina faces challenges as the new kid in town, making friends and attending school.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Big Little Baby / The Super Secret Mission
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Toon Bops: Miranda the Panda and Mark the Shark
Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Junior Junior Fliers/ Good Vibrations
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: A Good Case of the Hiccups / Stuck Up
programme.desc: Emmie's toy microphone starts to skip and repeat so Doc diagnoses her with 'Repeatitis'. Doc cleans the sand out of toy tractor Riggo so he can move his scooper up and down again.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Feather Wand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: While on a trip to the store, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. Later, when Bingo isn't invited to Chloe's party, she uses a magic feather wand to make things incredibly heavy.

programme.title: Movie: Spookley the Square Pumpkin
programme.desc: A pumpkin named Spookley is born in a pumpkin patch. He looks nothing like the other pumpkins! His shape is square, which makes the other pumpkins poke fun at him. After a terrible storm Spookley realizes it can be handy to be different.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Talkin' Trash/ Timmy TV

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Friends and Neighbors/ Just the Two of Us

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Boss of Me/ He Poofs, He Scores

programme.title: The King of Queens: S'ain't Valentine

programme.title: The King of Queens: Court Date
programme.desc: Carrie gets a ticket and Doug suggests that she go out on a date with the policeman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: White Collar
programme.desc: When the shift supervisor at work suddenly dies, Doug gets his job and Carrie is thrilled.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Rayney Day
programme.desc: Doug makes plans to hang out with Richie, until Ray Barone suggests a game of golf.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Where's Poppa?
programme.desc: Doug ends up in Dr. Becker's waiting room after being hit by a foul ball at a Mets game.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Train Wreck
programme.desc: Doug is disappointed when Carrie isn't jealous of his beautiful new trainee.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hungry Man
programme.desc: Doug embarrasses Carrie when he arrives unprepared at her boss's elegant cocktail party.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Time Share
programme.desc: The neighbours are separating and have a time-share for sale in the Hamptons.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Art House
programme.desc: Doug's patience with Arthur's eccentricities fades after he almost gets Doug fired.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Maybe Baby
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie contemplate having a baby; Doug talks to Arthur about fatherhood.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Queasy Rider
programme.desc: Doug feels the road calling and, against Carrie's advice, buys himself a motorcycle.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Home Alabama

programme.title: Movie: Sister Act
programme.desc: A lounge singer witnesses a murder by her mobster boyfriend and hides out in a convent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Tom Petty: Mysterious Ending
programme.desc: News of the sudden passing of celebrated rock musician Tom Petty shocked fans worldwide, but a deeper look into the music legend’s life reveals physical and emotional afflictions that may have led to his death at age 66.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Deadly Ambition
programme.desc: A shooting at the University of Alabama Huntsville leaves three professors dead and the community questioning how they missed a murderer in their midst.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Killing Spree
programme.desc: A string of murders targeting a pizza chain and its employees leads to a nationwide manhunt for a killer hell-bent on revenge.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Beware the Bayou
programme.desc: Billy Berger and Ky Furneaux are dropped in it up to their necks as they have to survive 21 days in the Louisiana swamp. They are washed out of their shelter by storms, must battle deadly snakes and avoid hungry alligators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Mayan Misery
programme.desc: Two survivalists are challenged to survive in a flooded jungle of Belize. The man and woman must face a labyrinth of Mayan caves filled with poisonous snakes and rabid bats.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Two survivalists are dropped on a deserted Fijian island. They must battle the elements, as well as each other’s annoyances, as they try to survive 21 days together. With blistering heat, minimal water and scarce food, this will be no honeymoon.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Battling for Life
programme.desc: From the heart of South America to the Malasian rain forest and Cambodian jungle, survivalists battle hypothermia, starvation, bloodthirsty insects, flash floods, heat exhaustion, medical emergencies and each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Two survivalists test their primitive skills on the razor sharp terrain of Andros Island in the Bahamas. Battling starvation, swarms of tiny predators and accusations about a partner's survival abilities turns this partnership into a bad marriage.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Wrath of Nature
programme.desc: Six adventures brave the fiercest elements across the globe, from unbearably wet conditions and violent lightning to frigid mountain temperatures.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Argentina Impossible
programme.desc: A survival instructor teams up with a pediatrician to fight storms, cold and starvation in Argentina's Yungas Cloud Forest. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before hypothermia shuts them down.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Homestead Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: The Raneys kick off an annual tradition on the Alaskan homestead with a project that passes along essential skills to the next generation. The Raneys check in via video with homesteaders who built a house with 30,000 rubber tires.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Winter Washout
programme.desc: In Alaska, Marty races to rescue his property from a deluge of snow runoff. In Hawaii, Matt builds a human-sized slingshot to bring down invasive trees. The Raneys check-in with homesteaders rebuilding after devastating wildfires.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The Raney family kicks off the most ambitious rescue ever, on their own 40 acres. As multiple generations gather to chip in, Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get thousands of pounds of gear to the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: One If by River, Two If by Air
programme.desc: An aerial supply mission faces turbulent skies as Marty breaks ground on massive foundation posts for his cabin. Misty and Maciah begin an innovative greenhouse that requires lumber, but Matt and Katie must first troubleshoot the new sawmill.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Back on Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew turn their trommel up to double speed hoping to get the most gold from Montana's historic Birdseye mine. Dirty water and ground that's not producing challenge the crew, forcing Dave to call an audible at the last minute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Boundary Blowout
programme.desc: On the scent of big gold, Turin and his crew test the limits of the landowner's patience when they cut a fence to access ground on his cattle grazing land. Dave investigates another promising hard rock mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Blue Room Bonanza
programme.desc: Chris makes an incredible discovery that sets the team up on the best gold all season. As winter starts to close in, Dave gets a hot tip that takes him 2,500 miles north to a mine where he pans the biggest nugget of his career.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: All In
programme.desc: In the season finale, it's a race against mother nature at the Blue Room Cut to capitalize on a short weather window before winter closes Team Turin out of Montana. Overcoming early mechanical setbacks, the team perseveres to a surprising end.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Welcome Stranger
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Parker goes deep into an underground mine, in search of more of the largest nuggets he's ever seen. Tyler tracks down a trommel for the team, and a local miner lets the team test a claim, leading to a rich reward.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Tyler's Trial
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Parker and his team discover a family-run operation in the legendary Palmer goldfields that's worth more than he's ever seen in the Yukon.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Parker tries out virgin ground on the Fitzgerald claim and makes a big discovery. If he wants to strike a deal, he has gain the trust of the family.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Hell's Crack
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scene: Parker and his team face a treacherous river, extreme heat, and machine breakdowns for a shot at $100 million in gold at Hell's Crack.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: The Honey Pot
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: The team encounters a dangerous new method for extracting gold while hunting for a huge payday in Tyler's hometown of Sandstone.

programme.title: 30 Inches Tall and Turning 18
programme.desc: Georgia Rankin is an average teenager at the height of an average two-year-old. Measuring 2 feet 7 inches tall, she's charismatic, and happy, despite suffering constant pain in her joints. We follow Georgia for a year as she seeks medical treatment.

programme.title: 40 Year Old Child: A New Case
programme.desc: Gabby is eight-years-old but still looks like a baby, now, new cases have emerged that may help unlock the mystery of her aging.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: An American Tail
programme.desc: Taylor has a large bump at the base of her spine that is far more dangerous than she realizes. John jokes about hip lump but turns out it's no laughing matter. Noelle had her ears stretched as a teenager, but now wants them repaired.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pops: Split Decisions
programme.desc: Shakisaha's earlobe split in half during a failed body modification attempt. After recovering from a flesh-eating disease, Kelly Ann developed a huge leg growth. Terrified of doctors, Dennis has gone 30 years without seeking treatment for his head bumps!

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: Bloomin' Bunions
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent's patient has feet that are so crooked her toes don't touch the floor, and Dr. Schaeffer meets a woman with behemoth bunions. Rachel has a toe crawling up her foot, and Dr. Haller has to get it back in line.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This is Zit
programme.desc: Tony has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Kevin has a bump in his jawline that is a "lady deterrent." Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead.Tommy's leg bump makes it difficult for him to work.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: Itchy, Itchy, Ya-ya, Da-da
programme.desc: Musician Kayla has itchy eczema everywhere, making it difficult to play her guitar. Juan was bullied so badly over the painful bumps he has on his neck and torso that he dropped out of high school. Teresa has a mysterious, deflating arm growth.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: A Foot Like a Fist
programme.desc: Dr. Schaeffer meets Carly, who may have one of the world's rarest foot conditions, and Dr. Vincent's new patient has feet so deformed that her toes nearly touch her heels. Dr. Haller is shocked to learn Michael is secretly operating on himself.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Headaches and Zombies
programme.desc: A violent patient who cannot be sedated endangers a pregnant ER doctor. An unexplained headache turns life threatening for a mom during a vacation, while a man with a fencepost through his torso jumps the triage line on a busy night in the ER.

programme.desc: A violent patient who cannot be sedated endangers a pregnant ER doctor. An unexplained headache turns life threatening for a mom during a vacation, while a man with a fencepost through his torso jumps the triage line on a busy night in the ER.

programme.title: The Little Couple: Will Returns to China
programme.desc: The Kleins are headed back to China but this time with all six grandparents in tow. It's an emotional trip as Will and the family learn more about his birth country.

programme.title: The Little Couple: I Don't Want to Leave!
programme.desc: The trip to China continues as the Klein family and all 6 grandparents visit the Forbidden City and take an immersive lesson in Chinese cooking. Then, the family climbs to the top of the Great Wall and reflect on what life could have been without Will.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Empire State of Bride
programme.desc: The entire Kleinfeld team comes together as a family to help Emily, who needs a dress for her 10-year vow renewal atop the Empire State Building in just two days. Olympian Queen Harrison faces new hurdles while deciding on her dream wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bionic Bride
programme.desc: Crystal and her sisters have some severe sibling rivalry. Will she be able to rise above it to find the perfect dress? Rebekah is known as the bionic model because of her prosthetic arm. Randy makes it his mission to find her a dress.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: The Kid's Got More Bags Than We Do!
programme.desc: Matt makes big strides in his plan to divest from the farm. While Zach and Tori and Jeremy and Audrey enjoy a beach adventure with their little ones, the brothers discuss what's next for their families and the farm.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Grandkids' First Christmas
programme.desc: As Amy and Matt plan separate holiday parties, Amy hopes her kids will enjoy celebrating with Chris. At Matt and Caryn's party, he shares big news with Zach and Jeremy, bringing the 'future' of the farm into the present.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: The Facts of Life
programme.desc: As babies arrive, life gets more complicated for the families. Nicole makes a controversial announcement.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: The New Normal
programme.desc: Kim's boyfriend, Michael, is released from rehab; Nicole and AJ get married.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Toast to Me
programme.desc: Shyremia's wedding will be shining with glitz and glamour; Lindsay's Jewish ceremony will be packed with emotion and joy.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Flirtatious Ape
programme.desc: Keshia exchanges vows on the lawn of an elegant mansion, while Jaclyn says 'I Do' at the zoo.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: So I Married My Ex-Babysitter ...
programme.desc: When a young gypsy man marries his ex-babysitter, the couple adds fire to a family feud that dates back to over 30 years. Later, a progressive gypsy woman defies her traditional Romanichal mom by marrying a gorger.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Rituals, Rules and the Ultimate Gypsy Test
programme.desc: A traditional gypsy mom demands that her daughter perform a series of ancient rituals to determine if she's ready to wed. Later, a gypsy teen plans to marry a gorger bad-boy against her family’s wishes.

programme.title: Virgin Diaries
programme.desc: Takes you inside the lives of adult virgins who reveal the challenges, truths, and anticipations of losing their virginity.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Movie: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: A man moves his family back to his hometown so he can continue his childish antics with his best friends.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob Riggle
programme.desc: Comedian and actor Rob Riggle joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel as they visit a "Ski Disaster Academy," celebrate some "North American Turds," and report the news while "Live on the Scene."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo party with some 'jean queens', learn the consequences of being selfish in 'share or else', and watch the drama unfold in 'brunch opera'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Steve Aoki II
programme.desc: Musician Steve Aoki joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to travel to the neon future, get way too wild up in the "crayhouse," and start seeing double.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Travi$ Scott
programme.desc: Travis Scott is here to show Rob, Chanel and Sterling what it's like getting 'Action Figured,' fend off the 'Antidote Side Effects' and celebrate with some 'Masters of the Dark.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCXXII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo defy it all in odds gods, get soaked with rain pain, and experience Russian childhood in Russian Rearing.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tami Roman

programme.desc: A rookie detective gets his first big case: a triple homicide. He finds himself in the middle of a cycle of violence that threatens to spin out of control.

programme.title: The First 48: Murder on Maiden Lane
programme.desc: In Atlanta, a young father is gunned down by a brutal robbing crew and Detective Tracy Lewis discovers on her first case that she may be chasing the wrong suspect.

programme.title: The First 48: The House on Madrona Street
programme.desc: A young woman is found on the floor of an abandoned house, naked and strangled to death. As the investigation unfolds, further horrors are revealed and detectives must act fast before the suspect kills again.

programme.title: The First 48: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: In Atlanta, when a young man is shot from 235 feet way, Det. Darrin Smith discovers an escalating feud that threatens to tear apart a neighborhood.

programme.title: The First 48: House of Horrors/ Final Sacrifice
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a vicious hammer attack leaves two young men clinging to life. Detectives race to catch the suspect before he strikes again. In Atlanta, detectives discover a selfless act performed by their victim led to his murder.

programme.title: The First 48: Last Hope/ Truth and Consequences
programme.desc: In Atlanta, a teenager's life is cut short over a neighbourhood beef. In Tulsa, a young woman goes missing and her family fears she was murdered.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Virtual Insanity

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Evolution of Danger

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: The U.S. Coast Guard desperately scours the Bering Sea for a missing crab vessel, while the fleet anxiously waits to discover the fate of its six-man crew. After a plea from his wife, Sig contemplates an early exit.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Don't Lose Your Head
programme.desc: The Mahseer has been fished almost to extinction. Its last stronghold may be in the jungles of Borneo, an area controlled by the headhunting Dayak people. The boys will need to risk life, limb and maybe their heads to find if this rumor is true.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Tacos and Tarpon
programme.desc: When the team heard reports of an untouched mecca for tarpon in Mexico, they were all over it. To get to these untouched 'Silver Kings,' the crew needs to navigate a maze of croc and mosquito-infested waterways and lagoons.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Danger Down Under
programme.desc: The Barramundi is a dream fish that is nearly impossible to find in the wild, unless you head way off the grid. The crew travels to the Land Down Under where Aboriginal guides will take them to a Barra fisherman's paradise.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Toxic Invader
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the disappearance of fish in Australia's Fitzroy River. Evidence points to the arrival of a new top predator, but it could be something far more insidious spreading into Western Australia.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: South Africa's Legendary Beast
programme.desc: A recent sighting in South Africa of a bizarre beast - half human, half fish - draws Jeremy into the story of creature with ancient origins and a fearsome reputation.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Jurassic River Beast
programme.desc: Tasmania is home to species found nowhere else on earth, including a colossal freshwater beast capable of breaking a person's arm. Jeremy Wade will venture into the island's dense, eerie forests in search of this formidable creature.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Return of the Outback Beast
programme.desc: Jeremy heads to Australia to investigate a terrifying underwater attack by a beast in a remote outback river. As his investigation unfolds, Jeremy is faced with the exciting possibility that a giant predator he once thought extinct could be back.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Italy's Lake Monster
programme.desc: The Lake Garda monster has been described as a huge, humped bear - half snake, half dinosaur. Jeremy travels to northern Italy to investigate and discovers that these picturesque waters could be hiding several enormous beasts.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Alaska's Lost River Kings
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Alaska to investigate the disappearance of the majestic king salmon. His search will take him through the heart of grizzly bear territory, remote native communities and ultimately the Pacific Ocean as he follows a trail of evidence.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Ice Age Predator
programme.desc: Tales of monstrous, man-sized pike have persisted in Europe for generations. Now, Jeremy Wade is on a journey to catch this prehistoric monster, starting in the lakes of Ireland and leading to unfished waters on the edge of the Arctic Circle in Sweden.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Cold Water Mystery
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to investigate reports of strange, alien species in the water surrounding the remote Aleutian Islands.

programme.title: Martin: Martin, I Want to Sing

programme.title: The Parkers: The Mourning After

programme.title: The Parkers: She's Hysterical
programme.desc: Nikki can't wait to become Prof. Oglevee's bride, but she learns that she's not pregnant.

programme.title: Black-ish: Juneteenth
programme.desc: The Johnsons go to Jack and Diane's school play about Columbus Day, and Dre is dismayed by the historically inaccurate way that the holiday is portrayed.

programme.title: Black-ish: Mother Nature
programme.desc: Bow is feeling overwhelmed after the birth of DeVante and learns she is suffering from postpartum depression. Dre urges her to get help and stands by her side while she works through it.

programme.title: Black-ish: Elder. Scam.
programme.desc: Ruby gets scammed and Dre begins to suspect that she isn't as sharp as she used to be, particularly because she was the one who used to scam other people. Zoey's friend Aaron visits and Diane develops an instant crush on him.

programme.title: Black-ish: Advance to Go (Collect $200)

programme.title: Black-ish: Public Fool

programme.title: Black-ish: First and Last

programme.title: Movie: Get Rich or Die Tryin'

programme.title: Movie: Shrek

programme.title: Movie: Shrek

programme.title: Movie: The Mask

programme.title: Movie: The Hollow

programme.title: Movie: Amityville: The Awakening

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The New Exhibit

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Eye of the Beholder

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Living Doll

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Black Leather Jackets

programme.title: Movie: Wes Craven's New Nightmare

programme.title: Movie: Freddy's Dead: The Final Nightmare

programme.title: Movie: Nightmare on Elm Street V: Dream Child

programme.desc: Freddy Krueger is resurrected and tracks down the remainder of the Elm Street kids.

programme.title: Movie: Wrong Turn 2: Dead End
programme.desc: A group of reality show contestants find themselves fighting for their survival against a family of hideously deformed inbred cannibals who plan to ruthlessly butcher them all.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Midcentury Markup

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pigeonhole Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a home that's full of surprises in Santa Ana, California. They work to modernize the house as much as possible to appeal to the modern-day buyer, but with every challenge comes many problems.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Rock Bottom Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a good lead on a 1500 sq. ft. house in Whittier, CA. The home is dirty and dated, with a large fireplace in the center that will cost a fortune to update. They struggle to find a happy medium between design cost and profitability.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Unpermitted Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a home in Rowland Heights, CA, that's jam-packed with issues. There's a large pool in a small backyard, and unexpected additions create problems they've never seen before.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Buyer's Remorse
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a smoking deal on a Yorba Linda, CA, home. They spend big money to remove a fireplace, but when Tarek goes behind Christina's back and changes a tile design, she tackles the new fireplace herself.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big House, Big Budget
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a risk on a huge home in pricey Anaheim Hills, CA, in hopes of making more money after sharing the profits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Treasure Hunt

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Deceiving Deal

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Post-Purchase Problems

programme.title: House Hunters: New Build or Bust in Denver

programme.title: House Hunters: Dueling in Tarpon Springs
programme.desc: A Florida couple hunts for a home that fits the needs of their blended family in Tarpon Springs. She wants a shorter commute and he wants to live near the water. Even if they can find something that works, they'll have to be quick in this hot market.

programme.title: House Hunters: A First Home in New Haven
programme.desc: After overcoming hardship and homelessness, a married couple searches for their first home in New Haven, Connecticut. He seeks a fixer with space for a game room, but she wants move-in ready with a fireplace and two full baths.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Go Bold or Go Home

programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol waste no time snatching up a townhouse in a hot neighborhood, but they quickly realize why they got it at a bargain price. They work to turn someone else's abandoned renovation into a glamorous home with custom features.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Vintage Vegas

programme.desc: Rhylee jeopardizes her job and relationships with the crew after a dramatic first night out. Tanner gossips about his relationship with Simone as things heat up between them. Still sidelined by his leg injury, Brian gets sent to the hospital.

programme.title: Below Deck: Everyone Hates Kate: Never Before Scene
programme.desc: The crew bonds over a trip to an elephant sanctuary, but Kate's attitude pushes the others to the brink. A day off at the beach club has Courtney protective over Brian. Simone learns Tanner has been gossiping about their relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Sorry You Feel That Way: Never Before Scene
programme.desc: Tanner gives Simone mixed signals by telling her that he just wants to keep things casual, while Ashton tries to squash his beef with Kate after their heated argument the night before. Kate promotes Courtney to second stew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Yacht-pocalypse Now: Never Before Scene
programme.desc: The crew tries to redeem themselves with returning charter guests after Ashton cancels a beach picnic which throws the entire boat into complete chaos. Rhylee and Ashton continue to butt heads while Tanner and Simone contemplate their relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: Exodus: Never Before Scene
programme.desc: The crew including Captain Lee are shocked to wake up and hear the shocking news that Kate quit. In Kate's absence, Simone and Courtney struggle to maintain order in the interior. Ashton doesn't remember his actions from the night before.

programme.title: Below Deck: Witch Hunt: Never Before Scene
programme.desc: Kevin spirals out in response to charter guest, and professional chef, Justine telling him to 'step it up.' Much to Ashton's dismay, Kate returns and interferes in the deck team's drama. Simone sets out to become a better Second Stew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Public Displays of Affection: Never Before Scene
programme.desc: Alexis Bellino and her new beau come aboard the Valor to celebrate her recent divorce. After the deck team deals with major issues, Lee comes to a decision about Rhylee's future, forcing Ashton to change his management style.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Scorpion Queen: Never Before Scene
programme.desc: Tanner and Kate's flirtations become more obvious to the crew which leads Simone to lose all respect for the two when she finds out they've already kissed. Pulling up to the marina, Kate sees the first yacht she ever worked on as a stewardess.

programme.title: Below Deck: Let Them Eat Penis Cake!: Never Before Scene
programme.desc: Captain Lee calls an all staff meeting to address the previous night's debauchery and gives the crew an ultimatum. Brian refuses to apologize for his behaviour at the night market and tells Courtney he is fed up, causing relationship turmoil.

programme.title: Movie: Kingsman: The Golden Circle

programme.title: Movie: The First Purge

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibal Death Pit

programme.desc: Satellites capture two strange patterns in the desert, and they are right next to Area 51.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Alien Evidence: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Occult Temple

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Great Wall

programme.title: Unearthed: Statue of Liberty: The New Secrets
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty is one of the most iconic sights in the world, yet there are still secrets to be found and mysteries to be solved. Historians, archaeologists and engineers embark on a quest to unravel the inspiration behind her curious design.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.desc: The brutal murder of a legal secretary in her Macon, Georgia home leaves police with few clues as to who would want her dead. Then, a co-worker's alibi falls apart, revealing a callous conspiracy of greed that shocks this genteel, southern town.

programme.desc: After a mother is brutally slain in her home, police collect bizarre evidence they hope will lead to a murderer. When a second body turns up, this Louisiana community fears a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Creek Runs Red
programme.desc: After a Tennessee fisherman finds a woman's body floating in a creek, family secrets, decades-long feuds, and a suspicious funeral shine light on a complex conspiracy. But the truth is far more shocking than anyone could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: A loving mother is shot three times at a gas station in Memphis, Tennessee. As police search for clues, a mysterious letter threatens to complicate the already-tense relationship between local law enforcement and the community they've sworn to protect.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: The Signs on Their Bodies
programme.desc: In 1987, the lifeless, mutilated bodies of multiple women began appearing around Delaware. The horrific deaths were the work of the state's first serial killer. The hunt for him would lead investigators down a dark road, that no one would soon forget.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: The Secret Code
programme.desc: A single footprint is the only clue when Hal Charboneau is found stabbed to death in his Portland home. When police learn of a bitter divorce and custody battle, they question his ex-wife. But they soon discover that Hal is not the only murder victim.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Proof of Life
programme.desc: Police are dubious when a woman reports her father Dwight Tobyne missing after eight months. None of the Tobynes seem eager to talk.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Bottom of the Stairs
programme.desc: Detectives called to the home of Ken and Kristine Fitzhugh learn that what was once considered an accidental fall is now being investigated as a homicide. They soon find themselves on the hunt for the real scene of Kristine's death... and for her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Don't Go in There
programme.desc: Beverly Puccio is brutally murdered and found at home by an oddly behaving ex-boyfriend. Detectives use security and traffic cam footage to piece together the last night of her life including an encounter with a mysterious stranger to find her killer.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The New World
programme.desc: There is more to the explorers who discovered America than we have been told. Learn that Christopher Columbus never stepped foot in North America and Hernán Cortés didn't defeat the Aztecs by himself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fire In the Sky
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths behind extraterrestrial spacecraft and we learn the truth of two pioneering flights.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: All-American Landmarks
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, discover the real truth behind some of America's greatest landmarks.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fire In the Sky
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths behind extraterrestrial spacecraft and we learn the truth of two pioneering flights.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: All-American Landmarks
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, discover the real truth behind some of America's greatest landmarks.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The New World
programme.desc: There is more to the explorers who discovered America than we have been told. Learn that Christopher Columbus never stepped foot in North America and Hernán Cortés didn't defeat the Aztecs by himself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Frank Lloyd Lakehouse

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Hill Country Hideout
programme.desc: Pete and his gang ride out to the Lone Star State to build a double-decker hideout in Texas Hill Country. Six live oak trees are used to create rustic perfection with a saloon-style first floor for sippin' sarsaparilla and a glass floor for views below.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Glasshouse Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete treks to New York's Catskill Mountains to build an NTS first - a glasshouse in the sky. Piecing materials together like a puzzle, Pete uses his clients' collection of 50 vintage windows to construct an elegant treehouse encased by walls of glass.

programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Shower Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a behemoth 1927 Tudor house, but while she admires the home's original details, her dad discovers a problem. She uses a kitchenette to create a bar, revamps an uneven patio and enlarges the master bathroom.

programme.desc: An English couple throw down the Flipping Crown against a team from New Zealand.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Seasoned Pickers Take on Rookie Flippers
programme.desc: Sassy friends Shanae and Sarah are all dressed up and ready to flip.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Second Generation Renovation on Georgia's Lake Arrowhead
programme.desc: Lisa and Angela are co-workers and friends that are searching for a house on Lake Arrowhead in Georgia. With the help of their daughters Danielle and Allie, they're hoping to find the perfect vacation home to share between their two growing families.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Family Renovation
programme.desc: Two brothers and their wives look for the perfect vacation home in Door County, Wisconsin, for their extended family. They find a charmer with plenty of space for up to 30 people, but their DIY reno reveals unexpected issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Georgia Reno on Their Minds
programme.desc: Outdoor enthusiasts John and Heather are looking for a vacation retreat for their family on Lake Oconee in Georgia, and they find a fixer-upper in an ideal setting.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lone Star State Update
programme.desc: After spending years living all over the world, Teresa and Jeremy find the perfect vacation home for their family in their home state of Texas. They're ready to put down roots, but their new lakefront home is in need of some TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Missouri
programme.desc: Empty nesters leave snowy Indiana and find a large home on Lake of the Ozarks. The couple has a big renovation budget and wants to update the home to accommodate all their expected visitors. Unfortunately they soon discover a setback during demolition.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Culinary Revolutions
programme.desc: There's no denying that some foods have revolutionized the culinary game while making stomachs happy. Scott Conant gives new meaning to an old favorite with an updated take on classic potato tots.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bermuda
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the landscape and cuisine of the island of Bermuda, a 21-square-mile British territory with Caribbean soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples Sicily's fried street eats, classic cannoli and unique pizza.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Honolulu
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores a bounty of multicultural delights in Honolulu.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Marseille
programme.desc: From beef stew to French pizza, Andrew Zimmern uncovers Marseille's edible icons.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.
